top3.sql:
SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.RelatedPostId
WHERE pl.PostId = 61217

UNION

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.PostId
WHERE pl.RelatedPostId = 61217

UNION

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
WHERE p.ParentId = 61217 OR p.Id = 61217

ORDER BY Popularity DESC;

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId,
    p.Title,
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.RelatedPostId
WHERE pl.PostId = 61217

UNION

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId,
    p.Title,
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.PostId
WHERE pl.RelatedPostId = 61217;

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.RelatedPostId
WHERE pl.PostId = 61217

UNION

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.PostId
WHERE pl.RelatedPostId = 61217

UNION

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
WHERE p.ParentId = 61217 OR p.Id = 61217

ORDER BY Popularity DESC;

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId,
    p.Title,
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN postLinks pl 
    ON (p.Id = pl.PostId AND pl.RelatedPostId = 61217)
    OR (p.Id = pl.RelatedPostId AND pl.PostId = 61217)
WHERE p.Id != 61217;

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
WHERE p.Id = 61217
   OR p.Id IN (SELECT RelatedPostId FROM postLinks WHERE PostId = 61217)
   OR p.Id IN (SELECT PostId FROM postLinks WHERE RelatedPostId = 61217)
   OR p.ParentId = 61217

ORDER BY Popularity DESC;

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.RelatedPostId
WHERE pl.PostId = 61217

UNION

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.PostId
WHERE pl.RelatedPostId = 61217

UNION

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
WHERE p.ParentId = 61217 OR p.Id = 61217

ORDER BY Popularity DESC;

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId,
    p.Title,
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN postLinks pl 
    ON (p.Id = pl.PostId AND pl.RelatedPostId = 61217)
    OR (p.Id = pl.RelatedPostId AND pl.PostId = 61217)
WHERE p.Id != 61217;

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId,
    p.Title,
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
JOIN postLinks pl 
    ON p.Id = CASE 
        WHEN pl.PostId = 61217 THEN pl.RelatedPostId 
        WHEN pl.RelatedPostId = 61217 THEN pl.PostId 
    END
WHERE p.Id != 61217;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.RelatedPostId
WHERE pl.PostId = 61217

UNION

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
INNER JOIN postLinks pl ON p.Id = pl.PostId
WHERE pl.RelatedPostId = 61217

UNION

SELECT 
    p.Id AS PostId, 
    p.Title, 
    p.Score AS Popularity
FROM posts p
WHERE p.ParentId = 61217 OR p.Id = 61217

ORDER BY Popularity DESC;
